name: rent-space
description: RentSpace.by — управление арендными площадями коммерческой недвижимости

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.build: node scripts/generate-favicons.mjs && npm run build --prefix client && npm run copy:client
scripts.migrate: npx cross-env NODE_ENV=development knex migrate:latest --knexfile server/db/knexfile.js
scripts.migrate:rollback: npx cross-env NODE_ENV=development knex migrate:rollback --knexfile server/db/knexfile.js
scripts.seed: npx cross-env NODE_ENV=development knex seed:run --knexfile server/db/knexfile.js
scripts.db:setup: npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.db:full: node scripts/reset-db.js && npx cross-env NODE_ENV=development knex migrate:latest --knexfile server/db/knexfile.js && npx cross-env NODE_ENV=development knex seed:run --knexfile server/db/knexfile.js && npx cross-env NODE_ENV=development node scripts/import-kvartal.js
